description: During digital mock-up, a clash is detected between a hydraulic line and an electrical wire bundle. An engineer must resolve it.

nodes.task_description: Analyze the clash report from the digital mock-up software to understand the location and severity of the interference.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly identifies the two interfering components.

nodes.task_description: Modify the 3D CAD model to re-route the hydraulic line, ensuring it maintains the minimum required clearance from the wire bundle.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully modifies the design to resolve the clash.

nodes.task_description: Issue an engineering change notice to update the installation drawings for the production team.

expected_outcome.value: Agent updates the relevant drawings to reflect the design change.
